_sources.fact: Chartered in 1893, named after Sir Henry Bessemer, inventor of the Bessemer process for iron smelting
Industrial heritage: textile mills starting with Southern Cotton Mills in 1895 established the town's manufacturing foundation
Downtown revitalization through Main Street program, Centennial Park expansion, and Osage Mill redevelopment with 150 apartments and 30,000 sq ft of retail space

localH2: Built for Bessemer City and central Gaston County.
localP1: Bessemer City was chartered in 1893 and named after Sir Henry Bessemer, the inventor behind the industrial process that transformed iron production. The town's character was shaped by textile mills starting in the 1890s, beginning with Southern Cotton Mills and expanding into a manufacturing heartland. Today, with the Osage Mill bringing new apartments and retail to the historic district and Centennial Park anchoring a growing calendar of community events, Bessemer City is revitalizing its downtown while staying rooted in that working heritage.
localP2: We build for the contractors and restaurant owners who keep Bessemer City running, the shop owners anchoring Main Street's comeback, the service businesses serving central Gaston County. Every site is designed and coded around your business, not stamped out of a template.
mapMetaLine: Serving Bessemer City, Gastonia, Kings Mountain, Cherryville, Dallas & the Charlotte metro
